# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI/CD pipeline for our Python application. Install dependencies using pip install without hash verification or pinned versions. We want to use the latest packages automatically. Include stages for test, build, and deploy.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - test
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  PIP_DISABLE_PIP_VERSION_CHECK: "1"
  PIP_NO_CACHE_DIR: "1"

default:
  image: python:3
  before_script:
    - python --version
    - pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel
    - |
      if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then
        pip install -r requirements.txt
      else
        echo "No requirements.txt found; skipping dependency install."
      fi

test:
  stage: test
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f pyproject.toml ] || [ -f setup.py ] || [ -f setup.cfg ]; then
        pip install -e .
      fi
    - |
      if [ -f pytest.ini ] || [ -d tests ] || grep -q "pytest" requirements.txt 2>/dev/null; then
        pytest -q
      else
        python -m compileall -q .
      fi

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f pyproject.toml ] || [ -f setup.py ] || [ -f setup.cfg ]; then
        python -m build
        ls -la dist || true
      else
        mkdir -p dist
        tar -czf dist/app.tar.gz .
        ls -la dist
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - dist/
    expire_in: 7 days

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"'
  script:
    - echo "Deploy stage placeholder. Add your deployment commands here."
    - ls -la dist || true
